ddls:
CREATE TABLE "epidemics" (
  "epidemic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each epidemic */,
  "epidemic_name" TEXT /* Name of the epidemic (e.g., COVID-19) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the epidemic */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the epidemic (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the epidemic */,
  "virus_type" TEXT /* Type of virus causing the epidemic */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Primary mode of transmission */,
  "r0_value" TEXT /* Basic reproduction number (R0) of the virus */,
  "case_fatality_rate" TEXT /* Case fatality rate (CFR) of the epidemic */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the epidemic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epidemic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "health_system_strength" INTEGER /* Rating of the country's health system (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Hubei, Guangdong) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the region belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude */,
  "health_authority" TEXT /* Name of the regional health authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "epidemic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the epidemic the case is associated with */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the case is associated with */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "hospitalization_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of cases that require hospitalization */,
  "test_positive_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of tests that are positive */,
  "testing_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted per day */,
  "source_reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability rating of the data source (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_epidemic_id FOREIGN KEY ("epidemic_id") REFERENCES epidemics ("epidemic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., CDC, WHO) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source (1-10) */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last verification of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_sources" (
  "case_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-source link */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_sources_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention (e.g., Lockdown, Vaccination) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention (if applicable) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Estimated cost of the intervention */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the intervention (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "compliance_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of compliance with the intervention */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the intervention data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_interventions" (
  "region_intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region-intervention link */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_interventions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_interventions_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases_interventions" (
  "case_intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-intervention link */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case entry */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_interventions_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_interventions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., public, private) */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the note is important */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases in this version */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in this version */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this is the latest version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_versions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
